raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 938 aims to raise teacher and school employee salaries by 50 percent by 2030.",
    "The bill seeks to close the existing wage gap between teachers and similarly educated college graduates in other fields.",
    "California is facing a workforce shortage in schools, with many teachers unable to afford to live in the communities where they work.",
    "Research shows that the overwhelming reason college students are not becoming teachers is due to the profession's low salaries compared to similarly educated professionals.",
    "Nearly two-thirds (63%) of college students not interested in teaching cited pay as one of the top three reasons.",
    "Teachers earn 23.5% less than comparable college graduates, indicating a wage gap."
  ]
}
```
